title: Ram Jaane
subTitle: Ram Jaane, an orphan, grows up to be a criminal. His social worker friend tries to reform him but Ram is keener to win over his childhood love, Bela, than turning over a new leaf.

title: Dharam Adhikari
subTitle: Dharamraj, a righteous man, manages his village's affairs justly, making him well-liked among the people. Irked by his popularity, a jealous Chaudhary and Shastri conspire to get rid of him.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Dream Girl
subTitle: A young woman, conning people to run an orphanage, falls in love with a rich man under the disguise of a princess. However, their romance crumbles when her truth comes out.

title: Jai Kuldevi Maa
subTitle: Rajal and her husband are unable to conceive a baby and pray to get their wish granted. Soon, a goddess appears and offers a solution and they are blessed with a daughter, Sonal.

title: Damini
subTitle: Damini witnesses her housemaid being raped by her brother-in-law and his friends. Despite facing many obstacles, she strives to get justice for her with the help of her husband and Govind, a lawyer.

title: Mehndi
subTitle: Newly-wed Pooja is left shocked when her in-laws and her husband start ill-treating her. Unable to bear the mistreatment, she decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Stree
subTitle: In the eerie townscape of Chanderi, dressmaker Vicky falls for a mysterious woman with a supernatural aura. His heart sinks at the possibility that she might be Stree, the resentful man-hunter.

title: Jai Dakshineshwar Kali Maa
subTitle: A young woman is harassed and tormented by her mother-in-law. She is rescued from her predicament by the Goddess Kali who is pleased with her ardent devotion.

title: Mardaani
subTitle: After child traffickers kidnap a beloved teenager, a Mumbai policewoman embarks on a personal mission to bring the vile perpetrators to justice.

title: Mardaani
subTitle: After child traffickers kidnap a beloved teenager, a Mumbai policewoman embarks on a personal mission to bring the vile perpetrators to justice.

title: Lorie
subTitle: Geeta Malhotra suffers a miscarriage and yearns to have a child. One day, she finds a lost child and brings him up as her own, only to face trial for his abduction later.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Colors Cineplex Bollywood
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: A.B.C.D
subTitle: Vishnu, a professional choreographer who quit his dance company due to disagreements with his manager, decides to form his own team together to win a major dance competition.

title: Dil
subTitle: A father pretends to be a rich industrialist to improve his son's chances of marrying in to wealth. However, his plan backfires on him when his true identity is found out.

title: Farishtay
subTitle: Veeru and Dheeru live under the tyrant ruler, Raja Jaichand. Later, they embark on a mission and strive to overcome challenges to defeat the dictator.

title: Baaghi 2
subTitle: Ronny, a soldier, learns of the disappearance of the daughter of his former lover. Soon, his intense investigation leads him to uncover a web of crimes and a secret from the past.

title: Achanak
subTitle: A man is determined to prove his lover's innocence after she is suddenly accused of murdering his family.

title: Muqaddar Ka Faisla
subTitle: A priest is framed and imprisoned for embezzlement and rape, which leaves his family in destitution. After his release, penniless and homeless, he sets out to seek revenge.

title: Muqaddar Ka Faisla
subTitle: A priest is framed and imprisoned for embezzlement and rape, which leaves his family in destitution. After his release, penniless and homeless, he sets out to seek revenge.

title: Bal Ganesh And The Pomjom Planet IV
subTitle: Bal Ganesh's friends accidentally crash-land on a planet named Pomzom, where they are held captive. Bal Ganesh must rush to save his friends.

title: Kaalia
subTitle: Kallu's life changes after his brother, Shamu, meets with an accident and requires money for his treatment. As a result, he is forced to rob Shamu's employer but gets arrested instead.

title: Haathi Mere Saathi
subTitle: Raju shares a strong bond with his elephant companions. One day, he faces a dilemma when he is told to choose between his animal friends and his family.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Kisna, a police officer, goes undercover in a village to expose a drug ring. He manages to convince the villagers to surrender but things take a turn when the police guns down the villagers.

title: Bal Ganesh
subTitle: Bal Ganesh, the mischievous son of Lord Shiva, embarks on several adventures with Mooshak the mouse, his friend and vehicle. Despite being young, he battles evil forces and protects the world.

title: Krodh
subTitle: Karan struggles to raise his five younger sisters and wants them to lead good lives. However, he is heartbroken when his sister, Asha, marries against his wishes and later, her marriage fails.

title: Bhagam Bhaag
subTitle: A drama troupe flies to London for a performance. However, things take a tragic turn when three members of their team are falsely accused of murder.

title: Garam Masala
subTitle: A flirtatious photographer juggles three air hostesses behind his fiancée's back. However, the facade unravels when his friend-turned-enemy starts snooping around.
